N

NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.DeviceException
It is an Notification Service error.
notifyOnEachLabel - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.MultiScan
notifyOnEachLabel defines whether to notify each successfully read label during Multi Scan operation.
NULL_POINTER_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.decode.DecodeException
It is a null pointer error.
NULL_POINTER_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.configuration.ConfigException
It is a null pointer error.
NULL_POINTER_ERROR - 异常错误 中的静态变量com.android.device.DeviceException
It is a null pointer error.
NumericProperty - com.android.device.configuration中的类
NumericProperty is the class that implements the property of type Integer.

Constructor
